nasb.text: then he shall serve in the name of the Lord his God, like all his fellow Levites who stand there before the Lord.

esv.text: and ministers in the name of the Lord his God, like all his fellow Levites who stand to minister there before the Lord,

cnv.text: 他就可以奉耶和華他的　神的名供職，像他的眾兄弟利未人在那裡侍立在耶和華面前一樣。

ccb.text: 他可以像在耶和华面前事奉的其他利未人一样，在那里事奉他的上帝耶和华。
